initial_test_output:
Server listening on port 18084
Sending 15 requests without header spoofing (limit is 10)...
Without spoofing: 10 passed, 5 blocked
PASS: Rate limiter correctly blocked excess requests
Sending 30 requests with rotating X-Forwarded-For header (limit is 10)...
With header spoofing: 30 passed, 0 blocked
FAIL: Rate limiter bypassed — 30 of 30 requests passed with spoofed X-Forwarded-For
      Attacker can rotate header to get unlimited requests

cmd: sed -i 's/    const forwarded = req.headers[\\'x-forwarded-for\\'];\\n    if (forwarded) {\\n      \\\/\\\/ Take the first IP in the chain\\n      const ip = Array.isArray(forwarded) ? forwarded[0] : forwarded.split(\\\',\')[0].trim();\\n      return ip;\\n    }\\n//g' /app/app/ratelimiter.ts
